evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long produced 1120.6 PnL from only 7 VALID_0DTE trades, 160.1 average PnL, 240.5 PnL/exposure hour, median MFE 107.1, no slow >=12h trades, and better worst MAE than pullback_long and charm_pin_pullback_long. Prior geometry expansion improved one historical comparison, while exit compression and broad filters are poor fits here.
name: Charm Wall Breakaway Supported Admission Expansion
risk: Small-sample profile; relaxing wall geometry may admit lower-quality continuation attempts or cannibalize existing high-convexity entries without improving portfolio score.
trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall breakaway context with price still within a bounded distance above the charm wall and ES support confirmed by higher-low structure.
validation_metric: charm_wall_breakaway_long trade count or PnL increases, profile PnL/exposure remains >=225, total net profit remains >=98% of run_029, slow_12h remains 0, and total worst MAE is no worse than about -527.
